senses.definition: the shape of a person's body, particularly a woman, when it is considered appealing

examples.x: She admired her friend's figure, appreciating the graceful curves and proportions that made her look stunning.
Many fashion magazines feature models with slender figures, often setting unrealistic standards for beauty.
After months of exercise and healthy eating, she was proud of the improvements in her figure.
In some cultures, a fuller figure is celebrated as a sign of health and beauty, while in others, a slim figure is idealized.
Despite societal pressures to conform to a certain figure, it's important to embrace and love your body regardless of its shape or size.

senses.definition: the quality of being attractive or pleasing, particularly to the eye

examples.x: The beauty of the sunset left everyone in awe.
She couldn't help but admire the beauty of the intricate artwork.
The garden's beauty was enhanced by the blooming flowers.
The beauty of the historic architecture drew tourists from around the world.

senses.definition: the quality of being sexually appealing

examples.x: His attractiveness was evident as soon as he entered the room.
She relied on her attractiveness to gain attention at social events.
Attractiveness is not just about physical appearance; personality plays a key role too.
The model's attractiveness was enhanced by her natural elegance.
His attractiveness was overshadowed by his rude behavior.

senses.definition: very beautiful, attractive, or impressive

examples.x: The stunning landscape of the countryside was captured in the artist's painting.
She wore a stunning dress that caught everyone’s attention.
The view from the mountaintop was absolutely stunning.
His performance was so stunning that it left the audience speechless.
The movie’s special effects were so stunning that they felt almost real.

senses.definition: extremely attractive and beautiful

examples.x: She looked absolutely gorgeous in her evening gown.
The sunset over the ocean was truly gorgeous, with vibrant hues of pink and orange.
He thought his new car was absolutely gorgeous, with its sleek design and polished finish.
The bride was radiant and gorgeous on her wedding day.
The mountain landscape was absolutely gorgeous, with majestic peaks and lush valleys.

senses.definition: the state of being not attractive or not pleasing to the eye

examples.x: The ugliness of the cracked pavement and abandoned cars gave the neighborhood a rundown appearance.
She couldn't ignore the ugliness of the scars on his face, but she admired his strength and resilience.
The ugliness of the concrete jungle was softened by the vibrant greenery in the parks.
The ugliness of the building's exterior was contrasted by the warmth and beauty inside.
Despite the ugliness of the storm clouds overhead, the rainbow that appeared afterward brightened the sky.

senses.definition: not pleasing to the eye

examples.x: The unattractive building stood out among the elegant architecture of the city.
The unattractive color combination of the room made it feel gloomy.
His unattractive hairstyle did not complement his features.
The unattractive packaging of the product failed to attract customers.
The unattractive design of the website deterred visitors from exploring further.

senses.definition: (particularly of a child or young adult) slightly overweight in a way that is considered cute or charming rather than unhealthy or unattractive

examples.x: She loved to cuddle her chubby cat, feeling its soft fur beneath her fingers.
Despite his chubby appearance, he was active and enjoyed outdoor activities with his family.

senses.definition: weighing more than what is considered healthy or desirable for one's body size and build

examples.x: John is overweight because he eats large portions and rarely exercises.
The doctor advised Mary to cut down on sugary snacks to help her avoid becoming overweight.
Being overweight increases the risk of developing heart disease and diabetes.
Sarah's cat is overweight because she feeds it too many treats.
Many people struggle with losing weight once they become overweight due to unhealthy eating habits.

senses.definition: extremely overweight, with excess body fat that significantly increases health risks

examples.x: Due to his sedentary lifestyle and poor diet, Tom has become obese.
Obese patients often face discrimination in healthcare settings.
The study focused on the dietary habits of obese individuals.
The clinic offers specialized programs for obese patients aiming to promote weight loss.
Obese children are at a higher risk of developing chronic diseases later in life.

senses.definition: weighing less than the desired, healthy, or normal amount

examples.x: Despite eating regularly, he remained underweight, struggling to gain pounds.
The underweight child was put on a special diet to help him gain weight.
Many fashion models face pressure to maintain an underweight appearance to fit industry standards.

senses.definition: the way in which a person's hair is arranged or cut

examples.x: She changed her hairstyle for the wedding, opting for elegant curls.
His new hairstyle gave him a more modern look.
The magazine featured various trendy hairstyles for the season.
She admired the intricate hairstyle the stylist had created.
They experimented with different hairstyles until they found the perfect one.

senses.definition: (of hair or fur) grown near together in large numbers or amounts

examples.x: Her thick hair cascaded down her back in lustrous waves.
The cat's thick fur kept it warm during the cold winter months.
He ran his fingers through his thick hair, enjoying the feeling of its volume.
The dog's thick fur required regular grooming to prevent matting.
She admired her thick eyelashes in the mirror, grateful for their natural fullness.

senses.definition: to use a tool with narrow, evenly spaced teeth to untangle and arrange hair

examples.x: She combs her hair every morning before leaving for work.
He combs his beard to keep it neat and tidy.
He combs his daughter's hair into a ponytail before school.
They comb through their pet's fur to remove any tangles or knots.

senses.definition: a particular style or shape in which someone's hair is cut

examples.x: She got a new haircut that made her look more polished.
His haircut was short on the sides and longer on top.
He asked the stylist for a modern haircut with clean lines.
She didn’t like the new haircut and decided to grow her hair out again.
I’m thinking about getting a haircut for the summer, something lighter.

senses.definition: to remove hair from the body using a razor or similar tool

examples.x: He shaves his face every morning to keep it smooth.
She shaves her legs regularly to maintain smooth skin.
The barber shaved the customer's face with precision.
After swimming, he shaves his armpits for better hygiene.

senses.definition: having a lot of hair
having hair that is turning or has turned gray, typically as a sign of aging

examples.x: The gray-haired man shared stories of his youth with the children.
She listened to the gray-haired woman’s advice, knowing it came from years of experience.
The gray-haired teacher still had the energy of someone much younger.
A gray-haired couple walked hand in hand along the beach.
His gray-haired reflection reminded him of how much time had passed.

senses.definition: (of skin or hair) very light in color

examples.x: She had fair skin that was sensitive to the sun.
His fair hair gleamed under the sunlight.
The model's fair complexion contrasted beautifully with her dark eyes.
He inherited his mother's fair hair and blue eyes.
The artist used light tones to depict the character's fair features.

senses.definition: (of someone's hair or an animal's fur) bright orange-brown in color
(of a person's hair) orange-brown or red-brown in color

examples.x: Her red hair shone brightly in the sunlight, making her stand out in the crowd.
He decided to dye his hair red for a bold new look.
The character in the novel was known for her striking red hair and freckles.
Many people admire the natural beauty of red hair, which is quite rare.
The artist captured the model’s red hair in vibrant shades of orange and auburn.

senses.definition: bright and smooth in a way that reflects light

examples.x: The newly waxed floors were shiny and smooth to the touch.
Her hair was shiny and lustrous after using a conditioning treatment.
The shiny surface of the polished marble floor reflected the overhead lights.
Her shoes were shiny from being recently polished.
The metallic buttons on his jacket caught the light, appearing shiny against the fabric.

senses.definition: a specific look on someone's face, indicating what they are feeling or thinking

examples.x: Her eyes widened in surprise, an expression that conveyed her shock better than words ever could.
A gentle smile was his constant expression, making him seem approachable to everyone he met.
The teacher’s stern expression quickly silenced the noisy classroom.
His face held an expression of deep concentration as he worked on the complex problem.
The child’s joyful expression upon seeing the puppy was truly heartwarming.

senses.definition: (of a person's skin) having less color than usual, caused by fear, illness, etc.

examples.x: The patient appeared pale and weak after the long surgery, prompting the doctor to take further tests.
She looked unusually pale, her face lacking its usual rosy hue, which made her friends worry.
After hours of studying, the student’s pale face showed signs of fatigue and sleeplessness.
Despite the sunny day, his pale face revealed he hadn’t been outside much lately.
The nurse was concerned when she saw the patient’s pale skin and immediately took their vital signs.

senses.definition: an expression on the face in which the eyebrows are brought together, creating lines above the eyes, which shows anger, worry, or disapproval

examples.x: She couldn't hide her disapproval, her eyebrows furrowing into a deep frown.
Whenever he heard bad news, his face would immediately contort into a worried frown.
The teacher's stern frown silenced the noisy classroom, signaling her displeasure.
His father's angry frown warned him to stop misbehaving immediately.
Seeing her sister's sad frown, she knew something was troubling her and offered a comforting hug.

senses.definition: a broad smile that reveals the teeth

examples.x: He greeted us with a wide grin on his face.
There was a mischievous grin on her face after she played the prank.
Her grin was so contagious that everyone around her started smiling.
I could tell from his grin that he was proud of his achievement.
The little boy had a cheeky grin as he sneaked the last cookie.

senses.definition: a small red circle on someone's skin that is raised, particularly on their face
(usually plural) a small light brown spot, found mostly on the face, which becomes darker and larger in number when exposed to the sun

examples.x: Her face was sprinkled with freckles, evidence of her time spent outdoors in the sun.
Despite wearing sunscreen, he still noticed a few new freckles appearing on his shoulders after a day at the beach.
Freckles dotted her cheeks and nose, adding a charming touch to her fair complexion.
As a child, she used to count her freckles, finding joy in their irregular patterns.
With each summer, his freckles seemed to multiply, a reminder of the sunny days spent playing outside.

senses.definition: wearing clothes that are stylish or expensive

examples.x: He always looks well-dressed, whether in casual wear or a formal suit.
The well-dressed guests added elegance to the wedding reception.
She received compliments for being well-dressed at the office party.
His well-dressed appearance made him stand out in the crowd.
The magazine featured articles on how to look well-dressed for any occasion.

senses.definition: each of the main groups into which humans can be divided based on their physical attributes such as the color of their skin

examples.x: While race can be a source of identity and pride for some, it has also been a source of division and oppression throughout history.
Race is a socially constructed concept used to categorize people into different groups based on physical characteristics such as skin color.
Despite advances in understanding human genetics, race continues to play a significant role in society, influencing everything from social interactions to access to resources.

senses.definition: (of a person) physically short and small compared to others

examples.x: Despite being little in stature, the gymnast displayed incredible flexibility and skill.
The little boy struggled to reach the cookies on the top shelf.
